---
title: "GLEAM scoring method comparison"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM scoring method comparison}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
m1 <- score_signature(expr = pbmc_medium_matrix, meta = pbmc_medium_meta, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "rank")
m2 <- score_signature(expr = pbmc_medium_matrix, meta = pbmc_medium_meta, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "auc")
m3 <- score_signature(expr = pbmc_medium_matrix, meta = pbmc_medium_meta, geneset = "immune_small", seurat = FALSE, method = "zmean")

cmp <- compare_scoring_methods(rank = m1, auc = m2, zmean = m3)
head(cmp)
```
